result.description: Experience world-renowned Japanese fine dining at Tojo's in Vancouver. Chef Hidekazu Tojo, creator of the California Roll, offers seasonal omakase menus and exquisite food served as an art form. The restaurant has a lovely ambiance inside, with nice little enclosed booths and a casually elegant space in Fairview.
result.hours: Tuesday - Saturday from 5:00PM with the last seating at 8:00PM. Takeaway: Order Online by 4PM for curbside pickup. Please allow at least 1 hour for preparation.

result.description: Blue Water Cafe is Vancouver's top destination for seafood, cocktails, wine and unparalleled service. Located in Yaletown, the restaurant offers an approachable fine-dining experience with a focus on sustainable seafood and West Coast inspired dishes. The menu features premium chilled seafood, sushi, and signature seafood entrees.
result.hours: Bar Daily from 4:30 PM, Dinner Daily from 5 PM

result.description: Chambar is a Belgian-inspired restaurant in Vancouver’s Crosstown neighborhood, known for its Moules Frites and extensive selection of Belgian beers.
result.address: 568 Beatty St, Vancouver, BC V6B 2L3, Canada
result.hours: Monday to Thursday 11:30am to 10:00pm, Friday to Saturday 11:30am to 11:00pm, Sunday 10:00am to 10:00pm

result.description: Phnom Penh Restaurant is a family-run institution that has been serving authentic Cambodian and Vietnamese cuisine in Vancouver's Chinatown for over 36 years. They offer a wide variety of dishes, including their famous butter beef, chicken wings, and noodle soups. The restaurant has received numerous awards and accolades, including a Michelin Bib Gourmand designation and a reputation as one of the best Asian restaurants in Vancouver.
result.address: 244 East Georgia Street, Vancouver, BC V6A 1Z7
